name: zoho-expense-pp-mcp
description: Upload receipts, tag expenses, and bundle monthly reports on Zoho Expense from the terminal

zoho_expense_organization_id.title: ZOHO_EXPENSE_ORGANIZATION_ID
zoho_expense_organization_id.description: Zoho Expense organization ID (sent as X-com-zoho-expense-organizationid header on every request)

zoho_expense_client_id.title: ZOHO_EXPENSE_CLIENT_ID
zoho_expense_client_id.description: OAuth client ID from api-console.zoho.in self-client

zoho_expense_client_secret.title: ZOHO_EXPENSE_CLIENT_SECRET
zoho_expense_client_secret.description: OAuth client secret from api-console.zoho.in self-client

zoho_expense_refresh_token.title: ZOHO_EXPENSE_REFRESH_TOKEN
zoho_expense_refresh_token.description: Long-lived refresh token issued after exchanging a 10-min authorization code
